_comment: Aquatic plant scatter (the Watershed × the Loom): the drop's paintings/water/ placed AT water, keyed off the authored water surface so they sit on the pond and shorelines, never mid-desert. Per candidate we read Terrain.water_surface_base (valid only where a water body covers the point) and its depth over the ground; a plant grows only within its depth band. `mode` float = a flat pad lying ON the surface (lilies, pool moss); emergent = an upright billboard rooted at the bottom in the shallows (reeds, rushes, cattails, kelp). Depth is (surface - ground): negative = the wet edge just above water, positive = submerged. Uses the AUTHORED base surface (stable), so live level swells don't shuffle the planting. Deterministic per cell, presentation only.
